source_text: When sending the new ClientHello, the client MUST copy the contents of the extension received in the HelloRetryRequest into a "cookie" extension in the new ClientHello.
rule_statement: When sending the updated ClientHello after HelloRetryRequest, the client MUST copy the cookie extension contents from the HRR into a cookie extension in the new ClientHello.
applies_when: Client constructs second ClientHello after receiving HelloRetryRequest with cookie
expected_value: exact copy of HelloRetryRequest cookie value
checkability_rationale: Can verify cookie is copied from HRR to second ClientHello.

source_text: Clients MUST NOT use cookies in their initial ClientHello in subsequent connections.
rule_statement: Clients MUST NOT include a cookie extension in their initial ClientHello in subsequent connections.
applies_when: Client constructs the initial ClientHello for a new connection
checkability_rationale: Can verify cookie is not included in initial ClientHello construction.

source_text: Servers operating statelessly MUST ignore these records.
rule_statement: Stateless servers MUST ignore unprotected change_cipher_spec records received between first and second ClientHello.
applies_when: Stateless server receives change_cipher_spec between first and second ClientHello
checkability_rationale: Requires testing stateless server path with interleaved CCS records.
